title: File:Norwegian Prima entering Kiel XX.jpg
description: Norwegian Prima entering Kiel for the first time, September 5 2022 — a dramatic close-up bow shot showing the spiral water slide on the side, the NCL letters on the funnel, the swirling hull livery, and the 'NORWEGIAN PRIMA' name at the bow.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by Claude (operator-supervised), 2026-05-27
visual_verification.note: Bow-three-quarter view of Norwegian Prima. Spiral water slide (likely The Rush) visible on the port side; NCL letters on funnel; signature swirling hull livery; name at bow. Slightly overcast Kiel water in foreground. Identity is unambiguous.
